item.title: Pasta Frola de Guayaba: Authentic Recipe for the Sweet Paraguayan Classic
item.author: info@paraguay4life.com (Paraguay4Life)
item.description: A delicate shortcrust pastry meets the fruity sweetness of guava. We take you into a Paraguayan kitchen and show you how to make this authentic treat.
